security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be modified during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data is not protected against modification during transmission.

assumptions: The system does not employ message integrity checks for vote messages.
The attacker can intercept and modify vote messages.

mitigation.strategy: Implement message integrity checks using digital signatures or MACs.

description: An attacker may modify the contents of a vote before it is processed by the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: The system does not provide a mechanism for non-repudiation of votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Votes are not cryptographically signed and are anonymous.

assumptions: The governance contract does not track vote origins or provide verifiable proofs.
The actor can cast votes anonymously.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a mechanism for non-repudiation of votes, such as requiring digital signatures or using a blockchain based audit trail.

description: An attacker can cast votes and then deny having cast them.

security_gap.gap_description: Proposal details may be accessible to unauthorized actors.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can view sensitive governance data.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Proposal data is not protected against unauthorized disclosure.

assumptions: The proposal details are publicly accessible without authentication.
The attacker can access the proposal information through public APIs or user interfaces.

mitigation.strategy: Implement authorization controls to restrict access to proposal details based on user roles or permissions.

description: Unauthorized actors may view sensitive data related to governance proposals.
